extraction.one_line_summary: VAN MOER Brent won from a 6:40 breakaway on a circuit finish, outsprinting WÜRTZ SCHMIDT Mads after OLIVEIRA Nelson's leadout faded
tactical_patterns: OLIVEIRA Nelson leading out from 6+ minute break neutralized own sprint, positioning WÜRTZ SCHMIDT second wheel before losing
WÜRTZ SCHMIDT wearing KOM jersey suggests breakaway riders prioritized intermediate points over conserving sprint energy

rider_signals.VAN MOER Brent: positive: timed sprint perfectly from poor position in long-range break, indicating superior explosive power reserves
rider_signals.WÜRTZ SCHMIDT Mads: neutral: strong second from ideal wheel suggests time trial power translates to positioning discipline but lacks punch
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Nelson: negative: tactical error doing full leadout in break context, wasted energy organizing rather than positioning
rider_signals.BAKELANTS Jan: neutral: 35-year-old sustained 6:40 gap through circuit racing, aging diesel still viable for long breaks
